ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the simulation */,
  "time_scaling_factor" REAL /* Scaling factor for the running time within the simulation */,
  "time_ave_vel_is_axisymm" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the time-averaged velocity is axisymmetric */,
  "time_ave_restart_files" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether to run the utility to create time-averaged restart files */,
  "num_processors" INTEGER /* Number of processors used for the simulation */,
  "memory_allocation" REAL /* Memory allocation for the simulation in GB */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Software version used for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., research, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., restart, solution, log) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, HDF5, ASCII) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_ave_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-averaged file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the time-averaged file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the time-averaged file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether this is the latest time-averaged file */,
  "average_interval" REAL /* Interval over which the averages were computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_ave_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restart_list_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restart list file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the restart list file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the restart list file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "list_type" TEXT /* Type of list (e.g., initial, final, intermediate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restart_list_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_simulations" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation within the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies (e.g., simulation, project, file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission", "resource")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_status_history_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
